overview: This insect is identified as a Psychedelic Forbhopper (Thericles obtusifrons). It is a type of grasshopper endemic to Southern Africa, particularly found in areas like Namibia and Botswana. These insects are noted for their distinctive, colorful patterns and are sometimes found in leaf litter. iNaturalist +1 2 sites Psychedelic Forbhopper (Thericles obtusifrons) · iNaturalist Psychedelic Forbhopper (Thericles obtusifrons) · iNaturalist. This insect is identified as a Psychedelic Forbhopper (Thericles obtusifrons).
It is a type of grasshopper endemic to Southern Africa, particularly found in areas like Namibia and Botswana.
These insects are noted for their distinctive, colorful patterns and are sometimes found in leaf litter.
